query_title: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea

recommendations.title: The Lost World
recommendations.overview: Professor Challenger leads an expedition of scientists and adventurers to a remote plateau deep in the Amazonian jungle to verify his claim that dinosaurs still live there.

recommendations.title: Beyond the Poseidon Adventure
recommendations.overview: After "The Poseidon Adventure", in which the ship got flipped over by a tidal wave, the ship drifts bottom-up in the sea. While the passengers are still on board waiting to be rescued, two rivaling salvage parties enter the ship on search for money,

recommendations.title: The Swarm
recommendations.overview: Scientist Dr. Bradford Crane and army general Thalius Slater join forces to fight an almost invisible enemy threatening America; killer bees that have deadly venom and attack without reason. Disaster movie-master Irwin Allen's film contains spectacul

recommendations.title: Fantastic Voyage
recommendations.overview: In order to save an assassinated scientist, a submarine and its crew are shrunk to microscopic size and injected into his bloodstream.

recommendations.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
recommendations.overview: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure, where she alone can save what's important to her by connecting with the lives she could have led in other universes.

recommendations.title: Oppenheimer
recommendations.overview: The story of J. Robert Oppenheimer's role in the development of the atomic bomb during World War II.

recommendations.title: Das Boot
recommendations.overview: A German submarine hunts allied ships during the Second World War, but it soon becomes the hunted. The crew tries to survive below the surface, while stretching both the boat and themselves to their limits.

recommendations.title: Torpedo: U-235
recommendations.overview: World War II: Resistance fighters accept a suicide mission to deliver a stolen Nazi submarine carrying atomic uranium. Hunted by Hitler’s army, the crew must outwit the German Navy to bring the cargo safely to America.

recommendations.title: X-Men: Days of Future Past
recommendations.overview: The ultimate X-Men ensemble fights a war for the survival of the species across two time periods as they join forces with their younger selves in an epic battle that must change the past – to save our future.

recommendations.title: The Abyss
recommendations.overview: A civilian oil rig crew is recruited to conduct a search and rescue effort when a nuclear submarine mysteriously sinks. One diver soon finds himself on a spectacular odyssey 25,000 feet below the ocean's surface where he confronts a mysterious force
